scripts.dev: doppler run --project semaphore -- pnpm exec tsx ./alchemy.run.ts
scripts.build: doppler run -- pnpm exec vite build
scripts.deploy: doppler run --project semaphore --config prd -- pnpm exec tsx ./alchemy.run.ts
scripts.test:e2e: node -e "if (!process.env.SEMAPHORE_BASE_URL) { console.error('SEMAPHORE_BASE_URL is required for semaphore e2e tests'); process.exit(1); }" && vitest run --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:preview: node -e "if (!process.env.SEMAPHORE_BASE_URL) { console.error('SEMAPHORE_BASE_URL is required for semaphore e2e tests'); process.exit(1); }" && vitest run --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts ./e2e/vitest/preview.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.test:watch: node -e "if (!process.env.SEMAPHORE_BASE_URL) { console.error('SEMAPHORE_BASE_URL is required for semaphore e2e tests'); process.exit(1); }" && vitest --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts
scripts.destroy: doppler run --project semaphore --config prd -- pnpm exec tsx ./alchemy.run.ts --destroy
scripts.sqlfu:generate: sqlfu generate && pnpm exec oxfmt sql/.generated migrations/.generated
